serviceDescription: Amazon CloudFront is a fast content delivery network (CDN) service that securely delivers data, videos, applications, and APIs to customers globally with low latency, high transfer speeds, all within a developer-friendly environment.

cards.title: CloudFront Edge Locations
cards.bodyText: Choose the geographies where your content will be served
cards.helpText:
Amazon CloudFront automatically maps network conditions and intelligently routes your users to the ideal edge location to minimize end-user latency when serving your traffic to the internet.

Learn more

You can manage your delivery costs to the internet by using CloudFront’s price classes to determine which edge locations are eligible to serve your content. You will only be charged fees specific to the edge locations from where the content was actually delivered within the selected price class.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Effective December 1, 2021, the first 1TB per month of data transfer out to the internet and 10 million http/https requests from all Edge locations will be free (excludes CloudFront China). We are working to update the calculator to reflect this expanded offering. In the meantime, please incorporate these changes into your pricing calculator inputs below.

cards.title: United States
cards.helpText: Amazon CloudFront charges traffic served based on data transfer out (internet/origin) and HTTP/HTTPS requests.
cards.bodyText: Also includes Edge locations in Mexico

cards.title: Discounted Pricing
cards.helpText:
Custom Pricing

For customers who are willing to make certain minimum traffic commits (typically 10 TB/month or higher). contact us

CloudFront Security Savings Bundle

Self-service pricing plan that combines CloudFront with benefits for AWS WAF to provide significant savings in exchange for a monthly spend commitment for a 1 year term.

components.label: info alert
components.content: If you signed up for CloudFront Security Savings bundle you could save up to 30% per month on Amazon CloudFront.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Note that this monthly estimate is based on CloudFront's On-Demand pricing. Significant discounts are offered when you commit to a monthly usage level of 10 TB or higher for 12 months or longer. Customers who commit to higher usage receive additional discounts. Please contact us if interested.
